tasks.detail: All 6 SEEL public records in jobs.json already use direct individual BambooHR subpage URLs (https://seelllc.bamboohr.com/careers/{id}). No generic URLs found. 7 pending records also use correct direct links. No action needed.

jobs:validate-source-expansion passes cleanly. blocked_active_counts.sources=0, jobs=0, pending=0, records=0. No blocked source is active. Emerald Cities Collaborative is already disabled in sources.json with source_status=blocked. No action needed.

jobs.json title is already 'Think 100% Campaigns Manager'. No orphan 'think %' found in any active public file. Generated page is correct. index.html renders dynamically from jobs.json. No action needed.

Fixed description_snippet in jobs.json. Was: 'Ist/ / Senior Data Scientist Lisbon, PT...' (garbled ATS metadata). Now: 'The Senior Data Scientist will lead advanced analytics initiatives to support EDP's renewable energy operations and strategic decision-making...' (302 chars, first sentence of canonical description).

Fixed generate-job-pages.js to convert \n\n paragraphs to

tags and bullet lines (•) to

  • elements. EDP page summary now renders with proper paragraph breaks and bullet list for What You Will Do section.

Removed HubSpot Consultant (Renew Home-8F00486888) from jobs.json. Archived in job-records.json with reason 'closed_or_invalid_hubspot_consultant' and archive fingerprint. Deleted generated page pages/hubspot-consultant-renew-home.html.

Cleared $420,887/year fake pay from Government Partnerships Advisor (Part-Time) in jobs.json and job-records.json. Set salary='', salary_min=null, salary_max=null, salary_visible=false, pay_confidence=rejected, pay_rejected_reason='metadata_or_false_positive_no_visible_pay'.
Cleared $420,887/year fake pay from Philanthropic Advisor (Part-Time). Same fix applied.

Cleaned malformed markdown across 4 Powerlines public jobs: Government Partnerships Advisor, Philanthropic Advisor, Director of State Policy, Director of Development. Patterns fixed: nested ]([ brackets, empty ]() URLs, and ](and/](to protocol errors. Preserved readable text: 'National Governors Association, National Conference of State Legislatures, and Western Governors Association'.

Generated pages now only show salary badge when salary_visible=true AND salary_min > 0. JSON-LD baseSalary only included when salary_visible=true. Previously salary badges appeared for all jobs with non-empty salary field even when salary_visible=false.
